defense.capexPlan: ₹6.21L Cr defence budget FY26; ₹1.72L Cr capital outlay for procurement; ₹1L Cr earmarked for domestic industry
defense.importSubstitution: 75% procurement from domestic sources by 2027; 3,738 items on Positive Indigenisation List Phase I-IV; 4th PLI tranche under evaluation
defense.govTargets: Defence exports ₹50,000 Cr by 2029; 10 Indian OEMs in global top-100; DRDO to commercialise 50 technologies annually

pliSchemes: PM Surya Ghar ₹75,021 Cr rooftop solar
power_renewable.capexPlan: ₹10 lakh crore transmission investment plan by 2032 (PGCIL + state utilities); 500 GW RE target by 2030 — 241 GW installed as of Q1 2026
power_renewable.importSubstitution: Solar wafer & cell domestic content requirement; ALMM list for solar modules; anti-dumping duty on Chinese solar glass; wind nacelle localisation push
power_renewable.govTargets: Net zero by 2070; 50% energy from non-fossil fuels by 2030; 50 GW offshore wind by 2030; 5 MMT Green Hydrogen by 2030

pliSchemes: Jal Jeevan Mission ₹3.6L Cr (rural tap water)
water_infra.capexPlan: Har Ghar Jal — 100% rural household tap coverage; ₹9,500 Cr JJM FY26 budget; ₹2,600 Cr AMRUT 2.0 FY26; industrial wastewater ZLD mandate
water_infra.importSubstitution: Water treatment equipment domestic sourcing; HDPE pipes and CPVC fittings local production incentives; STP & ETP technology indigenisation
water_infra.govTargets: Universal safe drinking water access; 100% urban wastewater treatment by 2035; 4,500+ cities under AMRUT; 500 Atal Mission cities completed

capital_goods.capexPlan: 11 industrial corridors under PM Gati Shakti; NICDC ₹35,000 Cr infrastructure investment; Dholera, Auric, Krishnapatnam cities under construction
capital_goods.importSubstitution: 15% BCD on select industrial machinery; machinery import substitution under Make in India; defence capital goods 100% domestic mandate
capital_goods.govTargets: Capital goods sector ₹5L Cr by 2025-26; exports $30B by 2025; 20% import reduction in industrial machinery

pliSchemes: 3 Bulk Drug Parks ₹3,000 Cr (HP, AP, Gujarat)
pharma_healthcare.capexPlan: 41 API/KSM projects approved under PLI; ₹90K Cr pharma sector investment target; 3 medical device parks approved
pharma_healthcare.importSubstitution: Reduce API import dependence from 68% to below 25% by 2030; critical drug self-sufficiency list (57 APIs); medical device import substitution policy 2024
pharma_healthcare.govTargets: Pharma exports ₹130 Cr by 2030; top-3 globally in generics; India as global clinical trials hub; 70% medical devices domestically produced

semiconductor.capexPlan: Tata Group fab ₹91,000 Cr (Dholera + Jagiroad); Micron ATMP ₹22,516 Cr; CG Power OSAT ₹7,600 Cr; target 3 fabs + 2 OSAT by 2026
semiconductor.importSubstitution: Zero import duty on capital goods for semiconductor fabs; BCD on imported PCBs; display fab domestic content requirement
semiconductor.govTargets: India semiconductor ecosystem ₹1.7L Cr by 2026; 1 million semiconductor engineers by 2030; chip exports $110B by 2030

railways.capexPlan: ₹2.4L Cr annual railway capex; ₹1.1L Cr RVNL project pipeline; 12,500 km new lines under PM Gati Shakti Rail
railways.importSubstitution: 100% domestic locomotive production; Vande Bharat 100% indigenised; Kavach system domestic IP owned by Research Designs & Standards Organisation
railways.govTargets: 100% rail electrification complete; zero carbon railways by 2030; DFC to cut logistics cost by 2%

ev_mobility.capexPlan: 10,000+ public EV charging stations by 2024; ₹3,500 Cr battery park (Rajasthan); highway charging every 40 km mandate
ev_mobility.importSubstitution: EV cells & packs: 0% import duty on capital goods; lithium refinery domestic push; BCD on imported EV battery cells from 2026
ev_mobility.govTargets: EV30@30 — 30% EV penetration by 2030; 2-3 wheelers 80% EV by 2030; 10 GWh domestic ACC capacity by 2026

pliSchemes: Shipbuilding Financial Assistance Policy (SFAP) — 30% subsidy on new builds
shipbuilding.capexPlan: NSC Mazagon Dock & GRSE Navy vessel orders ₹1.7L Cr; Coast Guard fleet modernisation; 400+ vessels under domestic build order
shipbuilding.importSubstitution: 100% warship domestic build mandate; merchant vessel 30% domestic requirement; marine engine indigenous programme
shipbuilding.govTargets: India as top-5 global shipbuilder by 2030; ship exports $6B by 2030; 20 major ports upgraded under Sagarmala

steel_metals.capexPlan: 300 MT steel capacity by 2030 (currently 179 MT); SAIL & RINL brownfield expansion; National Steel Policy capex ₹10L Cr
steel_metals.importSubstitution: 15-20% safeguard duty on steel imports; critical minerals mining in India (lithium, cobalt, nickel); BCD on Chinese specialty steel
steel_metals.govTargets: Steel exports 50 MT by 2030; green steel 50% share by 2047; critical mineral self-sufficiency for EV & defence supply chain

telecom_infra.capexPlan: 5G rollout: 0.8M towers being upgraded; BharatNet 2.5L village OFC by 2025; BSNL 4G-to-5G infra build using domestic gear
telecom_infra.importSubstitution: BSNL 4G equipment 100% domestic (TCS-led stack); 10-15% BCD on imported network gear; India 6G Vision Document 2030
telecom_infra.govTargets: 100% rural broadband by 2025; 1B 5G connections by 2030; telecom exports $10B by 2030; India 6G patent leader
